summary: P2 Features (Playlist Sharing & Collaborative Playlists) fully tested. All 15 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All P2 features implemented correctly with proper authorization checks
Share toggle generates 8-char share_id on first share, persists after unsharing
Collaborator permissions properly enforce owner-only management
Non-collaborators correctly blocked from adding/removing songs (403)
Collaborators see shared playlists in their playlist list
All UI text in German as required (Geteilt, Mitwirkende, Kopieren, etc.)
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during collaborator testing (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2 features fully working. Existing shared playlist 'Test Playlist UI' has share_id=559169e2 with 1 song. All collaborator CRUD operations tested with dynamically created test users.

backend_api.POST /api/playlists/{id}/share: PASS - toggles is_shared, generates share_id on first share
backend_api.GET /api/shared/{share_id}: PASS - returns shared playlist with songs and owner_name, requires auth
backend_api.GET /api/playlists/{id}/collaborators: PASS - returns collaborator list with id, username, email
backend_api.collaborator_sees_playlist_in_list: PASS - collaborative playlists appear in collaborator's GET /api/playlists

frontend_ui.playlists_page_share_badge: PASS - Share2 icon visible on shared playlist cards
frontend_ui.share_link_bar: PASS - appears when sharing enabled with full URL
frontend_ui.kopieren_button: PASS - 'Kopieren' button visible in share link bar
frontend_ui.mitwirkende_modal: PASS - opens with email input and collaborator list
frontend_ui.mitwirkende_modal_add_button: PASS - UserPlus button for adding collaborators

verified_features: Backend: POST /api/playlists/{id}/share toggles is_shared and generates share_id
Backend: GET /api/shared/{share_id} returns playlist with songs and owner_name (requires auth)
Backend: POST /api/playlists/{id}/collaborators/{email} adds collaborator and sets is_collaborative=true
Backend: Collaborator can add/remove songs from collaborative playlist
Frontend: Playlists page shows Share icon badge on shared playlists
Frontend: PlaylistDetailPage shows Share button and Mitwirkende button
Frontend: Share-Link bar appears when sharing is enabled with Kopieren button
Frontend: Mitwirkende modal opens with email input and collaborator list
Frontend: SharedPlaylistPage shows 'Geteilte Playlist' label and owner name
All UI text in German (Geteilt, Mitwirkende, Kopieren, Geteilte Playlist, etc.)
